The paper says "Synthesis of N,N'-(1R,2R)-(-)-1,2-cyclohexylenebis(2-hydroxyacetophenonylideneimine) (2)". The second half of the quote ("Recrystallization from absolute ethanol...mp: 144-145°C") IS verbatim but the opening is a fabricated paraphrase.
